name: Red Lobster Bisquick Rolls (Cut Down)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place Bisquick in a bowl.
2. Cut butter into 1/4 inch pieces.
3. Place the butter pieces on top of the Bisquick.
4. Stir with a fork until the butter is completely coated by the Bisquick.
5. Make a well in the mixture and add milk (and cheese as per the original Red Lobster recipe).
6. Stir only until blended.
7. Transfer to an ungreased biscuit pan, ensuring the biscuits touch each other on the sides to keep them soft.
8. Melt butter with seasonings as per the original Red Lobster recipe.
9. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 9 minutes.
